letter:
Re: Billing Discrepancy on Invoice megacloud-202605

To the Billing Department, MegaCloud Inc.:

We are writing to dispute a discrepancy identified on invoice megacloud-202605, covering the
billing period 2026-05-01 through 2026-05-31.

Per the governing clause (Email Agreement (2025-11-15)):

    "Confirming that MegaCloud will extend the ten percent (10%) loyalty discount under Amendment 1 through December 31, 2026, effective January 1, 2026. Please treat this email as an executed amendment to the Agreement."

Our records show the contractually correct charge for this period is $199,441.60.
The invoice as billed totals $221,624.00, a discrepancy of $22,182.40.

Calculation:
  - Discount: expected -22182.40, billed 0.00 (overcharge of 22182.40)

We request a corrected invoice or credit memo reflecting the $22,182.40 adjustment within
thirty (30) days. Please contact us with any questions.

Regards,
Accounts Payable

finding.clause_quote: Confirming that MegaCloud will extend the ten percent (10%) loyalty discount under Amendment 1 through December 31, 2026, effective January 1, 2026. Please treat this email as an executed amendment to the Agreement.
finding.explanation: Invoice total is higher than the contract's Virtual Billing Engine replay by 22182.40.
